notes: v0.5.7 — Multi-view conditioning to fight diffusion-model hallucination. Each Live Render tick now (by default) captures TWO SU views: a HIDDEN-LINE wireframe locking exact geometry, and a SHADED-WITH-TEXTURES capture for material/colour reference. Both go into the same generateContent call with a role-tagged preamble: 'Image 1 = exact geometry constraint; Image 2 = materials only.' Diffusion models follow this much better than a single image + long negative prompt. UI dropdown lets you fall back to single-view if you want lower latency. Works on both Poe and CF Gateway paths. Adds with_face_style helper that toggles RenderMode (Hidden Line/Shaded/etc.) around a write_image and restores on exit, even on raise.
